seoTitle: Add Services to Your Squarespace Website Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to add and showcase services on your Squarespace website, including booking and payment integrations, to attract more clients.
intro: Presenting your services clearly on your website can be the difference between a visitor booking with you or moving on to a competitor. This guide walks through how to add services to a Squarespace website, from creating service pages to integrating booking and payment tools. It's aimed at business owners, freelancers, and consultants looking to strengthen their online presence.

steps.heading: Plan your service pages
steps.body: Decide how you want to organize your offerings, whether as individual pages or a combined services section.

steps.heading: Add your services to Squarespace
steps.body: Use Squarespace's page and content tools to create clear, informative sections describing each service you offer.

steps.heading: Customize service page layout
steps.body: Adjust the design and structure of each page to highlight key details clients need, like pricing or scope.

steps.heading: Integrate booking or payment tools
steps.body: Connect third-party tools like Calendly or Stripe so clients can book and pay directly through your site.

steps.heading: Optimize for visibility
steps.body: Make sure your service pages are easy to find through your site's navigation and structured to attract inquiries.

faq.question: Can I let clients book appointments directly from my Squarespace service pages?
faq.answer: Yes, integrating tools like Calendly allows clients to schedule appointments directly from your service pages.

faq.question: Do I need a Squarespace Commerce plan to add services?
faq.answer: Depending on whether you're accepting payments, a Commerce plan may be needed for full booking and payment functionality.

faq.question: How many services can I add to my Squarespace site?
faq.answer: There's no strict limit — you can add as many service pages or listings as your business needs.

faq.question: Can I automate client bookings and payments together?
faq.answer: Yes, combining tools like Calendly and Stripe lets you automate both scheduling and payment collection in one flow.
